meaning: n.[医]粘液瘤病变性,多发粘液瘤病
examples: What factor helps to spread the disease of myxomatosis?
What factor helped to spread the disease of myxomatosis?
French physician decided to get rid of the wild rabbits on his own estate and introduced myxomatosis.
Myxomatosis - with its fuzzy, complex riff - is set to become a favourite.
He said there were up to 30 dead rabbits in the field which had caught myxomatosis, and Stanley had landed on the ground briefly on Tuesday to eat one of them, but had flown off again.
